memoryArtifacts.headline: We just found our 14th (and 15th) great grandpa. Tomb just behind the girls is Alexander first Earl of Huntly. We couldn't tell by looking at it, but learned it in the Huntly Castle guidebook.
Elgin Cathedral "Tomb of the Gordons" Alexander is the one in the middle.
Inside Elgin Cathedral where the "Tomb of the Gordons" is.

popularStory.headline: SIR ALEXANDER SETON GORDON 1410-1470 & EQUILIDIA HAY (1406-1439):
popularStory.description: SIR ALEXANDER SETON (GORDON) was born in January 1410 of Aberdeenshire, Scotland, to Sir Alexander Gordon Huntley Seton (1382-1440) and Elizabeth Seton Gordon (1385-1439.) He married (1) Elizabeth Cou …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly於1410年1月出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，他的父親Alexander Seton Lord Gordon28歲，母親Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon26歲。他於1426年1月8日與Egida Hay結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1470年7月15日在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾埃爾金。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly于1410年1月出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利时，他的父亲Alexander Seton Lord Gordon28岁，母亲Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon26岁。他于1426年1月8日与Egida Hay结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1470年7月15日在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾爾金爾埃爾金。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly was born in January 1410, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Seton Lord Gordon, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, was 26. He married Egida Hay on 8 January 1426. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 15 July 1470, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

fr.Perth Hir, Monmouthshire, Wales: Perthyr, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly est né en janvier 1410, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Seton Lord Gordon, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Egida Hay le 8 janvier 1426. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1470, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Elgin, Elginshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly im Januar 1410 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Seton Lord Gordon 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon 26. Er hat am 8. Januar 1426 Egida Hay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 15. Juli 1470 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly è nato il nel gennaio 1410 nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Seton Lord Gordon, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Egida Hay il 8 gennaio 1426. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 15 luglio 1470, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntlyが1410年1月にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父Alexander Seton Lord Gordonは28歳，母Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordonは26歳であった。1426年1月8日にEgida Hayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1470年7月15日に故郷で60歳で死去し，スコットランドエルジンシュアイアエルジンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly(이)가 1410년 1월 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Seton Lord Gordon(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1426년 1월 8일 Egida Hay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1470년 7월 15일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 엘긴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly nasceu em janeiro de 1410, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Seton Lord Gordon, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Egida Hay em 8 de janeiro de 1426. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1470, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly родился январь 1410 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Seton Lord Gordon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Egida Hay 8 января 1426 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 15 июля 1470 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности элгин, элгиншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly nació en enero de 1410, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Seton Lord Gordon, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Egida Hay el 8 de enero de 1426. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 15 de julio de 1470, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.
